room.caption: [G6-CoDC] If this place had a hub map, this would be it.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate6Prog,3) if dunState="0" image_blend=c_gray

sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate6Prog,1) if dunState="0" image_blend=c_gray

sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate6Prog,2) if dunState="0" image_blend=c_gray
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=160 newMapY=16 toRoom=rGame6_CoDR image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=16
